headline: Meditation and Mindfulness
description: Meditation trains attention and awareness. Mindfulness: non-judgmental present-moment awareness. MBSR (Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction, Kabat-Zinn 1979, UMass): 8-week program — reduced anxiety, depression, chronic pain in clinical trials. Meditation changes brain structure (increased gray matter in hippocampus, decreased amygdala size).
